scripts.free-port: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$port = 5174; $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($connections) { $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:reset: npm run free-port && npm run dev
